source.definition: to read a text carefully and completely in order to understand or gather information

explanation.sourceText: The phrase combines the English preposition 'through' with the verb 'read', which originates from Old English 'rǣdan', meaning to advise, interpret, or read.
explanation.targetText: Expresia combină prepoziția engleză „through” cu verbul „read”, care provine din engleza veche „rǣdan”, însemnând a sfătui, interpreta sau citi.

source.additional: Regular verb. It describes the process of reading a text in its entirety, often with the goal of comprehension.

target.definition: a citi cu atenție pentru a se informa

explanation.sourceText: The expression 'pe de-a-ntregul' is a Romanian idiomatic phrase that describes the complete reading or thorough working through of a text.
explanation.targetText: Expresia „pe de-a-ntregul” este o construcție idiomatică românească care indică citirea completă a unui text.

target.additional: Used in academic and general contexts where thorough reading is required.

explanation.sourceText: A direct description of the activity of reading something attentively.
explanation.targetText: Descriere directă a acțiunii de a citi cu atenție.

examples.sourceText: I will read this article carefully.
examples.targetText: Voi citi acest articol cu atenție.

examples.sourceText: Do you read the article through?
Do you (plural) read the newspaper through?
I have read the assignment through.
I will read the text through.
I would read the book through if I had time.
examples.targetText: Aș citi cartea pe de-a-ntregul dacă aș avea timp.

learningTips.text: Remember 'a citi pe de-a-ntregul' means to read something completely—think of reading a whole book from start to finish.
The phrase 'pe de-a-ntregul' sounds like 'pay day entirely'—imagine paying full attention to the entire text.
Link 'to read through' with the idea of going 'through' every page carefully, just like 'a citi pe de-a-ntregul'.
Visualize a student reading a document thoroughly for an exam—that's 'a citi pe de-a-ntregul'.
